_comment: Whop Membership to Google Sheets Sync Configuration

status_tabs._comment: Status-based tabs: Segregates members from 'Whop API - Reselling Secrets' by status

status_mapping._comment: Active = paying only (status=active). Left = no longer in Whop (left, expired). Other = past_due/completed/unresolved/drafted. canceling/left/churned from API.

status_tabs._note: These tabs already exist with headers: Name, Phone Number, Email, Product, Status, Discord ID, Status Updated

continuous_sync._comment: Continuous sync mode: Runs periodically and adds new members incrementally
continuous_sync._note: Set enabled to true to run continuously. Otherwise runs once when executed.

_note_google_service_account: Google service account JSON is loaded from config.secrets.json (google_service_account_json) or RSForwarder/config.secrets.json

Active.subject: Thanks for being a member!
Active.body:
Hi {{name}},

Thank you for your continued support.

Best regards

Left.subject: We miss you
Left.body:
Hi {{name}},

We'd love to have you back.

Best regards
